Instrument (official title): Legea nr. 372/2005 privind performanța energetică a clădirilor (consolidată 2024)
Scope & Principles: Backbone of EPB in Romania: EPC regime, requirements for new buildings (NZEB), documentation and inspections; basis for MEPS compliance through EPC evidence.
Implementing Documents: Metodologia Mc 001-2022; modele EPC (MDLPA 03.03.2023); Ordin 2237/2010 – acreditare; proceduri QA.

Instrument (official title): Metodologia Mc 001-2022 (OMDLPA 16/2023) – Metodologie de calcul al performanței energetice a clădirilor
Scope & Principles: Defines EPB calculation, integration of systems/RES, EPC outputs and documentation; mandatory for EPC issuance and compliance checks.
Implementing Documents: Monitorul Oficial 46/17.01.2023; MDLPA publication; EPC templates.

Instrument (official title): Ordin nr. 2237/2010 – Regulament privind atestarea auditorilor energetici pentru clădiri
Scope & Principles: Defines grades, competencies, practice renewal and QA; ensures EPC integrity.
Implementing Documents: Publicat în M.Of. nr. 683/08.10.2010; actualizări ulterioare.

Instrument (official title): OUG nr. 18/2009 – Creșterea performanței energetice a blocurilor de locuințe
Scope & Principles: Framework for municipal renovation of multi-apartment buildings: roles, documentation, steps, contracts and financing.

Instrument (official title): OUG nr. 69/2010 – Reabilitare termică prin credite garantate de stat
Scope & Principles: Loan-guarantee scheme for thermal rehabilitation of dwellings; complements grants and broadens access.
Implementing Documents: HG 736/2010 – Norme; plafoane anuale de garanții.
Status / Last Update: In force between 2010 and October 2025; repealed by OUG 52 of 2025.

Instrument (official title): OUG nr. 92/2024 – Înființarea rețelei naționale de ghișee unice de eficiență energetică (OSS)
Scope & Principles: Creates county/municipal OSS desks and a national portal; prioritizes vulnerable consumers; streamlines access to finance and permits.
Implementing Documents: Instrucțiuni MDLPA; acte locale de organizare; integrare digitală.

Instrument (official title): OUG nr. 163/2022 – Completarea cadrului de promovare a energiei din surse regenerabile (prosumatori)
Scope & Principles: Completes prosumer framework (individual & collective), connection and settlement; enables on-site RES in buildings.

Instrument (official title): ANRE Ordin nr. 15/2022 și Ordin nr. 95/2022 – reguli de comercializare pentru prosumatori
Scope & Principles: Sets settlement/compensation rules up to 400 kW per POD; modifies earlier frameworks; clarifies billing.

Instrument (official title): AFM 'Casa Verde Fotovoltaice' — Ghid de finanțare 2024 (Ordin 2045/20.09.2024)
Scope & Principles: Grants for residential PV + storage (2024); accredited installer routes and MIS tracking.
Horizontal EE framework: targets, programmes, public-sector leadership, audits and planning.

Instrument (official title): Legea nr. 325/2006 a serviciului public de alimentare cu energie termică (actualizată)
Scope & Principles: Regulates DH service; supports rehabilitation and efficient DH trajectories; enables building-side substation upgrades and low-temperature operation.
Implementing Documents: Strategii locale; Modernization Fund; state aid.

Instrument (official title): Ordonanța nr. 16/2025 — Transpunerea Art. 17(15) EPBD 2024/1275 (interdicție stimulente publice pentru cazane fosile)
Scope & Principles: Bans public incentives for new stand-alone fossil-fuel boilers; defines exceptions and transitional rules; aligns funding with decarbonisation.
Implementing Documents: Note de fundamentare; instrucțiuni către programe publice (AFM/PNRR).
Competent Authority: Government of Romania; MDLPA; ME; AFM.

Scope & Principles: Optional EU SRI scheme; provides methodology and indicators for smart readiness.
Sets overall framework including Art. 9 (MEPS), Art. 10 (solar in buildings), Art. 15 (SRI/TBS), Art. 17(15) (no public incentives for fossil boilers).
Competent Authority: EU; national transposition ongoing for specific articles.

Scope & Principles: Horizontal energy efficiency obligations; public-sector leadership; efficient DH&C definition and trajectories.
Strengthens RES targets including in buildings and heat; communities and prosumers provisions.
Competent Authority: EU; national implementation via OUG 163/2022 and related acts.

Instrument (official title): Legea nr. 10/1995 privind calitatea în construcții (consolidată)
Scope & Principles: Overarching quality law; sets the construction quality system, technical regulations and responsibilities across lifecycle.
Implementing Documents: Reglementări tehnice în construcții; verificatori; recepție; post-utilizare.
